title: Basic SQL Insert Statement
scenario: Write a basic SQL insert statement to insert a new record into a table called 'employees' with columns 'id', 'name', and 'salary'. The record to be inserted has the values 1, 'John Doe', and 5000.
constraints: Must be a single SQL statement
Must use the insert into syntax

evaluationCriteria.description: Is the SQL statement syntactically correct?
Does the SQL statement adhere to the constraints specified?
